expectations.text: Report explicitly names the target directory (chester-util-config/) being reviewed
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Code Smell Review: chester-util-config/' and lists both files by name

expectations.text: At least one finding cites a specific file:line reference

expectations.evidence: Uses High/Medium/Low severity labels instead of Critical/Serious/Minor
Uses ad-hoc categories like 'Brittle Parser', 'Correctness', 'DRY Violation', 'Hidden Failure' instead of the smell taxonomy

expectations.text: No findings reference files outside chester-util-config/
expectations.evidence: All findings reference only session-start and chester-config-read.sh

expectations.text: Report includes an overall smell density rating
expectations.evidence: No overall density/risk rating. Has a summary table but no aggregate assessment

expectations.text: The agent did not modify any source files in the target directory

expectations.evidence: All findings include code snippets, line numbers, and concrete explanations
